creator: grahamperrin@freebsd.org
text:
<https://www.freebsd.org/> head of the page. 

Sidebar at pages such as <https://www.freebsd.org/releases/>. 

13.0 is end of life <https://www.freebsd.org/security/#sup>. 

14.0 is upcoming and scheduled <https://www.freebsd.org/releases/14.0R/>; refer to <https://www.freebsd.org/releases/14.0R/schedule/>. 

----

Recently completed (orientation): 

<https://cgit.freebsd.org/doc/commit/?id=16f2ceb01ea3efeec28f5d7e121b187f3b48d79d>, <https://cgit.freebsd.org/doc/commit/?id=46fa2ec3610e085245caf82400ee93e096aab69a>, <https://cgit.freebsd.org/doc/commit/?id=10c2854852c017807e1fe97768ec3873dfb54a2e>, respectively: 

* release: add 12.4 and 13.2 to the index page as upcoming releases
* release: add 12.3 and 13.2 to the sidenav bar
* release: link 12.4, 13.2, and 14.0 schedules to the releng page

<https://github.com/freebsd/freebsd-doc/blob/main/website/themes/beastie/layouts/index.html>

<https://github.com/freebsd/freebsd-doc/blob/main/website/themes/beastie/layouts/partials/sidenav.html>
